name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-28
title: lib/checks.py test coverage gaps + shim consolidation
description:
Test coverage improvements for lib/checks.py:
1. Positive-path test for check_naming (currently only violation path tested)
2. End-to-end test for check_imports_resolve resolve/missing cases on real docs
3. Deep-nested symlinks test for check_symlinks_resolve (Inv 30 forbids hardcoded depth limits)
4. check_template_producer_consistency against real producer (after _PRODUCER_FIELDS fix)
5. validate_feature retired short-circuit at library boundary (currently only via CLI shim)
6. check_sentinel directory-walk branch (only file-path branch tested)
7. Purity guarantee test (Inv 44(d)) — verify library functions never sys.exit/print/raise

Shim consolidation: 7 enforcement CLI shims + validate-feature.py repeat the same 10-line sys.path.insert + import + print + exit pattern. Factor into lib._cli.run(check_fn, argv) helper so each shim becomes 3 lines.

history.note: Closed in CONTRACT-WAVE-9: lib/checks.py coverage gaps filled in test-lib-checks.py (positive-path check_naming, missing-import check_imports_resolve, deep-nested symlink, directory-walk check_sentinel, library-level retired-feature short-circuit, purity guarantee). Shim consolidation deferred to a follow-up backlog (filed separately if needed) since current shim count is small and the coverage portion was the priority.
